economic_notes: Muskowekwan Gaming Inc. (bingo hall) closed ~8 months due to COVID-19, reopened July 2021. MFN Land Development LP operates real estate/land development including fee simple lands. Muskowekwan Resources Ltd. involved in potash development with Encanto Potash Corp. Muskowekwan Business Development Company II Ltd. sub-subleased reserve land to Port Regina Limited Partnership for 98 years.
notes: Fiscal year end March 31, 2021 (not 2024). Consolidated entity includes 7 subsidiaries (Muskowekwan First Nation, CMHC Housing, Gaming Inc., Family Healing & Wellness Centre Inc., TLE Revenue Account, Business Development Company Ltd., 211413 Saskatchewan Ltd.) and 4 GBEs accounted for by modified equity method (Gas Bar & Confectionary Ltd., Resources Ltd., Business Development Company II Ltd., MFN Land Development LP). Muskowekwan Resources Ltd. has $8.6M debt to First Nations and Metis Fund Inc. at 12% interest, debenture matured 2017 — significant contingent risk. COVID-19 significantly impacted bingo hall operations. MFN Land Development LP created in prior year with $9.3M land transfer. Total government transfers estimated as ISC + FNIHB + CMHC = $10,538,920 + $1,502,602 + $475,940 = $12,517,462 plus Touchwood Agency Tribal Council $1,189,463 = $13,706,925. OSR calculated as total revenue minus estimated government transfers.
